column8: I_____________(cook) dinner by the time you get home.
column9: In a few minutes, I________________(wait) here for Craig for over two hours. Where can he be?

column11: They_____________(not/finish) painting the house by the time we get back from holiday.

column17: We_________________(probably/not/leave) by the time you get home.
